channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What is really behind medical students using AI? [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Medical students who skip writing their own reflections are not lazy, but...

item.title: Mycobacteria May Predict Graft Failure After Lung Transplant
item.description: Early isolation can serve as a biomarker for patients at higher risk of poor outcomes. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Early Pregnancy Thyroid Issues Signal Later Hypothyroidism
item.description: Thyroid abnormalities in early pregnancy are linked to a higher risk of developing hypothyroidism later in life. Medscape Medical News

item.title: Study finds about 15 percent of U.S. pregnant women report drinking in past 30 days
item.description: From 2021 to 2024, 15.2% of U.S. pregnant women reported drinking alcohol in the past 30 days, according to research published by the U.S. Centers for...
